exercises.code:
# skeptic B
tb = '''Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "cli.py", line 10, in main
    run()
  File "pipeline.py", line 4, in run
    normalize(row)
  File "normalize.py", line 2, in normalize
    return row["email"]
KeyError: 'email'
'''
frames = [ln.rsplit(" in ", 1)[-1].strip() for ln in tb.splitlines() if " in " in ln and "File" in ln]
print("frame1", frames[0], "frame2", frames[1], "frame3", frames[2])

exercises.code:
def parse_dni(d: str) -> str:
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    if not (d.isdigit() and len(d) == 8):
        raise ValueError(f"dni inválido: {d!r}")
    return d

fixture = ["12345678", "123", "87654321", "12AB5678"]
minimal = next(d for d in fixture if not (d.isdigit() and len(d) == 8))
print("minimal=", minimal)

exercises.code:
def normalize_phone(p: str) -> str:
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    return "".join(c for c in p if c.isdigit())

print("H1: el símbolo + se elimina; los dígitos 51 deben quedarse si vinieron")
print("exp1", normalize_phone("+51 999 111 222"), normalize_phone("999 111 222"))
print("H2: +51 vs 51 deben compartir prefijo 51")
print("exp2", normalize_phone("+51 999 111 222")[:2], normalize_phone("51 999111222")[:2])

exercises.code:
import logging, io
# skeptic: fixture del packet
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("familiarity.ingest")
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
log.addHandler(h)
log.propagate = False
log.info("stage=ingest event=start")
print(buf.getvalue().strip())

exercises.code:
import logging, io
# skeptic: fixture del packet

def cli_stub_good(n):
    log = logging.getLogger("cli.stub")
    log.handlers.clear()
    buf = io.StringIO()
    h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
    h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
    log.addHandler(h)
    log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
    log.propagate = False
    log.info("event=progress")
    print(f"RESULT={n+1}")
    print(buf.getvalue().strip())

cli_stub_good(2)

exercises.code:
def mask_email(email: str) -> str:
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    local, _, domain = email.partition("@")
    if not domain:
        return "***"
    return f"{(local[:1] or '*')}***@{domain}"

def mask_phone(phone: str) -> str:
    digits = "".join(c for c in phone if c.isdigit())
    return f"***{digits[-4:]}"

print(mask_email("carlos@ejemplo.pe"))
print(mask_phone("+51 988 777 666"))

exercises.code:
import hashlib, json
# skeptic: fixture del packet
record = {"source": "banco_a", "id": "C001", "version": 3, "payload": {"m": 1}}
payload_hash = hashlib.sha256(json.dumps(record["payload"], sort_keys=True).encode()).hexdigest()[:12]
key = f"{record['source']}:{record['id']}:v{record['version']}:{payload_hash}"
print("idem_key=" + key)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic B, S09 Q0: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Encadenar la causa en __cause__ sin perder contexto». Motivo desde theory del packet: raise NewError(...) from e encadena la causa en __cause__ sin perder contexto (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S09 Q1: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Fail-fast (abortar el job)». Motivo desde theory del packet: delimiter vacío en config es fail-fast (abortar el job), no cuarentenar una fila (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S09 Q2: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Solo datos; diagnóstico a stderr». Motivo desde theory del packet: CLI bien diseñada: solo datos a stdout; diagnóstico a stderr (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S09 Q3: descarté distractores y me quedé con «a***@ejemplo.pe». Motivo desde theory del packet: mask_email seguro: a***@ejemplo.pe (primer char + ***@dominio) (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S09 Q4: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Puede reintentarse con backoff; ValueError de datos no». Motivo desde theory del packet: TimeoutError en fetch remoto puede reintentarse con backoff; ValueError de datos no (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S09 Q5: descarté distractores y me quedé con «La entrada más pequeña que reproduce el bug». Motivo desde theory del packet: minimal repro es la entrada más pequeña que reproduce el bug (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).
